generated_oml:
instance MABI_MAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First rotary axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial serial robot, composed of a permanent‑magnet synchronous motor and a gear transmission."
]

// 2. Physical sensing components
instance MotorShaftPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor shaft of the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorShaftPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance GearOutputPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the planetary gear output of the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearOutputPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring the motor electrical current (I_M) of the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// 3. Data transmitted via MQTT
instance MotorShaftPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftPositionEncoder
]
instance GearOutputPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearOutputPositionEncoder
]
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// 4. Measured and computed data
instance MotorMeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor shaft position trace (r_M)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]
instance GearMeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gear output position trace (r_G)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearOutputPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]
instance MotorCurrentMeasuredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current trace (I_M)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]
instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed motor torque trace (τ) from motor current and encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorShaftPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]
instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed motor angular velocity trace (ω) from encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]
instance GearTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed gear torque trace (τ) derived from motor torque and gear characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]
instance GearAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed gear angular velocity trace (ω) from gear encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearOutputPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]
instance SystemTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed system torque trace (τ) derived from gear torque."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]
instance SystemAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed system angular velocity trace (ω) from gear output position."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearOutputPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

// 5. Simulated data from Simulink
instance SimulinkMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output trace (\\̂r_M) from the Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance SimulinkGearOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gear output trace (\\̂r_G) from the Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance SimulinkSystemOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output trace (\\̂r_out) from the Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

// 6. Models
instance MotorSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component model of the MABI MAX 100 first rotary axis motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]
instance GearboxSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component model of the planetary gear transmission in the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]
instance SimulinkFirstAxisModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of motor and gear behavior for the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction model: Coulomb‑Viscous."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction model: Stribeck."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction model: Dahl."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction model: LuGre."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

// 7. Enablers
instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool enabling structural and behavioral modeling for the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionDiagnosticsService
]
instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB/Simulink execution engine enabling simulation of motor and gearbox behavior."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionDiagnosticsService
]
instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol broker enabling real‑time streaming of calibration data to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionDiagnosticsService
]
instance AASEnablingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell enabling asset abstraction for the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionDiagnosticsService
]
instance WebDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based UI dashboard enabling real‑time visualization of friction diagnostics."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionDiagnosticsService
]
instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component implementing data calculation and simulation models ensuring traceability."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionDiagnosticsService
]

// 8. Services
instance FrictionDiagnosticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Digital shadow service providing real‑time visualization, friction model identification, simulation, and live comparison between measured and simulated outputs."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossAnalysisInsight, FrictionParameterExtractionInsight, ControllerRefinementAction
]

// 9. Insights and Actions
instance FrictionLossAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of friction loss impact on motion accuracy for the first rotary axis."
]
instance FrictionParameterExtractionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extraction of friction parameters (Coulomb, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) from live data."
]
instance ControllerRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to update controller parameters based on extracted friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time streaming and processing synchronized with the robot’s control cycle. Sensor data are ingested and processed within the same timeframe as the controller update, enabling immediate friction estimation and visualization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A single DT entity composed of: (1) Asset configuration (MABI MAX 100 first axis) represented by AAS; (2) Engineering models (SysML structural/behavior); (3) Data‑calculation and simulation models (Simulink); (4) Data traces (measured and simulated); (5) Processing component that consumes input traces, applies models, and outputs derived traces; (6) Dashboard for visualization. All components interact through the AAS and MQTT.
"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans from design (ideal friction‑free simulation models) to manufacturing (actual plant with embedded encoders) and to operation (continuous runtime identification). It therefore covers the ‘operated’ life‑cycle stage, with continuous model adaptation during use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "White‑box (analytical) friction models capture physical phenomena (load, temperature, time) but require parameter identification; black‑box models bypass this. The DT maintains traceability of each simulated data point to its source model and input data, allowing verification against measured traces. Continuous identification mitigates drift due to wear or tooling changes, improving validity over time.
"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between PT and DT employs the MQTT protocol over a standard IP network, delivering sensor streams to the DT data acquisition component.
"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) as the standard interface for digital twins; SysML as a standard MBSE modeling language; MQTT conforms to open messaging protocols."
]
